829.hook: Join Gulliver as he tumbles between tiny Lilliputians and giants of Brobdingnag, exposing the absurdities of our world.

221.hook: Holmes returns from the dead to outwit his greatest foes in London’s foggy streets.

33283.hook: Unlock the power of differentiation and integration without the intimidating jargon.

537.hook: From haunted heights to cursed relics, Doyle spins chilling tales that will keep you up at night.

40284.hook: When god‑like aliens crash into Earth, desire and chaos ignite in a wildly irreverent sci‑fi romp.

27475.hook: A fearless girl roams the Montana prairie, confronting murder and destiny with gun‑powder grit.

3321.hook: Amid cobbled streets, ex‑convicts chase love and a chance at salvation.

1510.hook: Four kings swear off romance—until clever ladies turn their vows into a sparkling battle of words.

61851.hook: A murderer wrestles with his own conscience in a haunting exploration of sin and redemption.

12082.hook: Witness the vivid, otherworldly panoramas captured by Spirit and Opportunity on the Red Planet.

61262.hook: Poirot’s little grey cells untangle twisted motives in a series of baffling crimes.

76668.hook: A canoeist tests the loyalties of his wife and his friend in a deadly river showdown.

60979.hook: Dive into the mind of a legendary speculator and learn the timeless rules of Wall Street.

27997.hook: A devoted minister battles doubt and destiny while shaping a fledgling colony’s spiritual future.

4300.hook: Experience a single day in Dublin as Joyce maps the mind’s labyrinthine wanderings.

51428.hook: Amid the trenches, a doomed romance soars, proving that even war can’t silence the human heart.

1931.hook: A silent airship hides secrets that could tip the balance of a world at war.

20203.hook: From a runaway printer to a Founding Father, Franklin shares the witty lessons that shaped America.

560.hook: When a daring British spy infiltrates the South African Infantry on the Western Front, every whispered secret could decide the fate of the war.

79.hook: A lone hacker uncovers a government back‑door that could cripple the Internet – and now every click could be his last.

173.hook: When the town’s trusted doctor begins treating victims of a string of gruesome murders, the truth lurks behind a chilling smile.

19476.hook: A newlywed couple’s dream voyage to the stars turns into a terrifying fight for sanity as ancient alien terrors awaken.

16328.hook: From the mist‑shrouded halls of Heorot to the dragon‑guarded hoard, behold the timeless saga where a lone warrior wrestles with doom itself.

70114.hook: Four of the world’s most notorious criminals unite in a deadly plot, and only Poirot’s razor‑sharp mind can untangle the web before the final victim falls.

70652.hook: When an Antarctic expedition uncovers an unimaginable, pre‑human city, they awaken a horror that shatters the very foundations of science and sanity.
